title: 显式执行安装 smoke 本地门禁

sources.reason: The installed no-active check-ai aggregate invokes a PR audit when given any baseline.
Defines the local check-ai sub-gates and aggregate PR behavior.

riskAssessment.reason: Initial skeleton; replace with task-specific implementation and review risks.

executionDecision.reason: The remote failure is isolated to the aggregate check-ai entry point in the installed smoke flow.

preReviewWarnings: Replace with task-specific review focus, or clear when no special review focus remains.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The installer smoke flow runs local status, backtrack, coverage, and ownership checks without invoking a self-referential PR audit.
The smoke flow runs check-ai-pr separately against the temporary repository's pre-install base.
The complete local quality and governance gates pass.
guidelines: Keep local and PR gate commands explicit in CI.
Do not weaken or remove the installed template's PR ownership gate.
Keep the change limited to the installer smoke local gate.

intent.problem: The installed aggregate check-ai cannot be used for local validation with a baseline because its no-active branch invokes check-ai-pr; using HEAD therefore fails on an empty PR diff.
constraints: Keep check-ai-pr against the pre-install commit.
intent.rationale: Run the local sub-gates directly and retain a separate full PR audit, matching each command to its intended diff model.

evidence: Workflow runs check-ai-status-consistency, check-ai-backtrack, check-ai-coverage-guard, and check-ai-diff-ownership directly.
Workflow runs check-ai-pr with the saved pre-install base.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized continued remediation of remote CI blockers.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
